reviews.review_title: Devs your game has fell off
reviews.review_description: Listen lab monkey or mutants now was my favorite game so many fun levels, free mods, and community is nice it’s just there has not been a update in months if it’s true you own scary baboon now, you have priorities, but just realese the update cause the lack of new content has ruined a once great game, the bundle from January is still here, just update the game every once in a while, don’t go stranger things season 5 on us please stop ignoring this game needs something new, i hope your working on a update cause you lose one player every day if you don’t keep adding updates, take a break from scary baboon you update that so much and focus on this, cause scary baboon has enough stuff to keep us busy, so just please update the game.

The developers not care about this game at all, hasn't updated in months. And I know exactly why, they went silent around the time the game stared a downward trend of player counts. They saw that the game was clearly failing, and decided to completely vanish.No communication between the devs and players even when they had updates every week. Not to mention the fact that unless you play in a private lobby, you'll be shocked with the amount of p2w "mods". Also they don't reply to any reviews too, they have about 3 or 4 responses, and that's the only way the reply, 3 prewrote answers most likely made by ai. Also if you want another example of how little they care, they cared so little that they didnt even care to make a model for the characters, they just used free models for the gorillas and probably half the game too. If you have a single brain cell, don't download this app, it's a waste of storage

reviews.review_title: BEST GTAG FAN HORROR GAME EVER
reviews.review_description: This game is the first of its style that I play repeatedly. The quest system and mod tree are very engaging. Yes, you heard me. IN-GAME MODS! These can be so fun for trolling people and evading monsters, though they do take time to get. This game is more sigma than bombardino crocodilo. There are many fun, scary levels to play with your friends. 10/10 would recommend, would do again, would bring a friend.
Why just why
I just redownloaded it and it is still so much fun I play it a lot but pls make the daily quest give 100 aura each it will help new players a lot
i love this game but it hasent been updated since 2024 christmas its 2025 christnas idk where the devs are but plz update i luv this game please update soon devs ty!

reviews.review_title: One of the greatest horror games on vr
reviews.review_description: This game has a feeling I can't describe and a look that feels right, this game feels like home and is genuinely scary (*Cough* Prison and sewer level ) and i know this game has unity assets but I feel like it adds to the feeling, movement isn't heavy or floaty the levels are great, the community is nice, mod ideas are a 10/10, I feel like there's something deeper going on in the lab and I feel like there's good potential for lore and story. I'm glad the game is back up, and I hope it continues to update. 🫡
Pretty good and scary game me like 5 stars

I have been playing this game since there was only three maps and it’s been so fun ever since. One suggestion is to please update the game. I’ve been waiting a long time for an update and maybe you should make something in the game to say when the next update will come like a sign. Next, a little bit ago other peoples voice chat stopped working for me so please try to fix that. I can barely hear anyone but I can still hear every other sound and other people can hear me. Also congratulations KJ1 ￼on becoming the owner of three games! Mutants Fros and now Scary Baboon! (Kinda a big deal)! Keep up the great work! Finally where are you guys? I play every day possible but just to see that it hasn’t been updated in months. Overall great game!!!

EDIT: I just saw the short about the game shutting down because of the new rule, but I’m still having the voice chat problem so when it’s fixed, please fix the problem. Thanks for making an awesome game and keep fixing it!!! I want more update updates!!!

reviews.review_title: Awesome game but there is a problem!
reviews.review_description: This game is awesome but the game is bugging out. I cannot hear other players,  jump scare sounds and monsters noises. I can only hear regular sounds such as walking and normal sound effects (door’s creaking) etc. All settings are good and everything is up to date. Please help fix this problem!  Would rate higher if there wasn’t this issue.

This horror game has a lot of maps to begin with and they are all fun. The jumps scares are pretty scary as well! The mods are so fun it is the BEST thing in this game. This game gets 5 star and I would highly recommend this game if you like fun horror games.
